The task is to deploy a 3-node CockroachDB cluster in the `cockroachdb` namespace using native Kubernetes resources. Let me check what's currently in the namespace first, then create the necessary resources.

Let me start by checking what resources exist in the namespace.

content.text: RBAC is in place. Now I'll deploy the headless service, public service, StatefulSet, and a PodDisruptionBudget in one apply.

input.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  publishNotReadyAddresses: true
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
  ports:
    - name: grpc
      port: 26257
      targetPort: 26257
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster-public
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
  ports:
    - name: grpc
      port: 26257
      targetPort: 26257
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
spec:
  serviceName: crdb-cluster
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: crdb-cluster-sa
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
      containers:
        - name: cockroachdb
          image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: grpc
              containerPort: 26257
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          command:
            - /bin/bash
            - -ecx
            - |
              exec /cockroach/cockroach start \
                --insecure \
                --advertise-addr=$(hostname -f) \
                --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 \
                --listen-addr=0.0.0.0:26257 \
                --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257 \
                --cache=25% \
                --max-sql-memory=25% \
                --logtostderr
          env:
            - name: COCKROACH_CHANNEL
              value: kubernetes-insecure
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: http
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 5
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health?ready=1
              port: http
              scheme: HTTP
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 2
          volumeMounts:
            - name: datadir
              mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-data
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: datadir
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster-pdb
  namespace: cockroachdb
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
EOF
input.description: Deploy CockroachDB headless service, public service, StatefulSet, and PodDisruptionBudget

statefulset.apps/crdb-cluster created

content.text: All resources created. Now poll until all 3 pods are Running.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  READY=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cockroachdb --no-headers 2>/dev/null | grep -c "Running" || true)
  echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) — Running pods: $READY/3"
  if [ "$READY" -ge 3 ]; then
    echo "All 3 pods Running."
    break
  fi
  sleep 10
done

content.thinking:
Only one pod exists and it's not ready. The StatefulSet only created pod 0 so far. This might be because the StatefulSet is deploying pods sequentially by default (orderedReady pod management policy), and the first pod isn't becoming Ready (its readiness probe is failing). The other pods won't be created until pod 0 is Ready.

Let me check why pod 0 is not ready.

content.text: Only pod 0 was created and its readiness probe is failing, which blocks the StatefulSet from creating pods 1 and 2. Let me check what's wrong.
